OPA verifies the JWT and the writer
injects the subject as audit author,
then forwards to the fixed-role writer
(which does no JWT of its own).

All three paths land in the same function API
(SECURITY DEFINER; app roles never get table
grants) and the same immutable audit trail.

OPA — verifies JWT + writer role, forwards the write
